//: Scope config for acceptance/test-repo-standard.mjs — installed by repo-standard-toolkit.
//checks: The changelog category check is OFF with a stated reason: 146 released sections predate adoption and use this repo's extended category vocabulary (Tests/Hardened/Validated/Decided…, documented in CONVENTIONS §11). Released history is not rewritten. [Unreleased] discipline and RS-lockstep still run.

changelog.why: released history uses the extended category vocabulary documented in CONVENTIONS §11; history is not rewritten — new [Unreleased] entries use the six canonical categories

placeholders.why: this repo SHIPS its own {{SLOT}}/{{URL}} render-template grammar and its docs name that grammar literally, fenced excerpts included; render-readiness-verdict.mjs fails closed on unfilled slots itself

//counts: The README's standing-test file count is bound to the real acceptance/ glob so it can never go stale. The checks total alongside it is a measured number, re-measured when the suite changes.
